definition: Billing provider NPI.
Number of distinct observed months for this provider.
notes: Only counts months present in input; missing calendar months are not filled.

definition: Total paid across all observed months.
Mean monthly paid.
Median monthly paid.
Maximum single-month paid.
Unweighted mean of monthly paid_per_claim_t; all months weighted equally.
notes: Use claim_weighted_paid_per_claim for volume-weighted version.

definition: Unweighted median of monthly paid_per_claim_t.
Std dev of monthly paid_per_claim_t.
Claim-weighted paid per claim: sum(paid_t) / sum(claims_t) over months with claims_t > 0.
missing_value_logic: NaN if no months with claims_t > 0.
notes: More robust than mean_paid_per_claim; high-volume months contribute proportionally.

definition: Coefficient of variation of paid_t (std / mean).
missing_value_logic: NaN if mean is 0 or fewer than 2 months.

definition: Median absolute deviation of paid_t.
Mean absolute gap-aware change in paid_t per calendar month.
formula_or_logic: mean(|paid_{i+1} - paid_i| / gap_months_i) over consecutive non-NaN observed pairs.
missing_value_logic: NaN if fewer than 2 valid observations.
notes: Normalised by calendar-month distance; a 3-month gap counts the same per month as a 1-month gap.

definition: Max paid divided by median paid; measures worst-month extremity.
missing_value_logic: NaN if median is 0 or no valid values.
notes: Not gap-sensitive; purely cross-sectional.

definition: Largest monthlyized pct growth between consecutive observed months.
formula_or_logic: max((paid_{i+1} - paid_i) / paid_i / gap_months_i) for pairs where paid_i >= MOM_MIN_DENOMINATOR.
notes: Pairs where prior paid < MOM_MIN_DENOMINATOR are skipped to avoid near-zero blow-up.

definition: Largest monthlyized absolute drop in paid_t.
Number of PELT structural breakpoints in the ordered observed paid_t sequence.
missing_value_logic: NaN if ruptures not installed or fewer than changepoint_min_obs months.
notes: Operates on observed rows only; calendar gaps between rows are not modelled.

definition: Largest absolute difference in median paid_t between adjacent PELT segments.
formula_or_logic: max(abs(median(seg_{j+1}) - median(seg_j))) across adjacent segment pairs.
missing_value_logic: NaN if no breakpoints or PELT not run.
notes: True dollar level shift; not a ratio.

definition: largest_level_shift_paid divided by max(|pre-segment median|, 1).
missing_value_logic: NaN if no breakpoints or PELT not run.

definition: Total observed months with |robust z-score| > threshold.
notes: Robust z baseline is prior ROBUST_Z_WINDOW observed rows, not calendar months.

definition: Fraction of evaluable months flagged; denominator excludes the rolling warmup window.
notes: Denominator is months_active minus warmup window, not total months.

definition: Flagged months in the last FLAG_RECENT_MONTHS observed rows.
notes: Based on observed rows, not calendar months.

definition: Longest run of consecutively flagged observed rows.
formula_or_logic: max run length of True in flagged boolean series.
notes: Consecutive means adjacent observed rows, not adjacent calendar months.

definition: Mean across months of top-code paid share.
missing_value_logic: NaN if column absent or all NaN.

definition: Max across months of top-code paid share.
missing_value_logic: NaN if column absent or all NaN.

definition: Mean across months of top-3-code paid share.
missing_value_logic: NaN if column absent or all NaN.

definition: Max across months of top-3-code paid share.
missing_value_logic: NaN if column absent or all NaN.

definition: Fraction of non-NaN observed months where top-3-code paid share > TOP3_HIGH_THRESHOLD.
notes: NaN months excluded from both numerator and denominator.

definition: Minimum monthly HCPCS paid-share entropy across observed months.
missing_value_logic: NaN if column absent or all NaN.
notes: Low values indicate highly concentrated billing.

definition: Mean monthly HCPCS paid-share entropy.
missing_value_logic: NaN if column absent or all NaN.

definition: Largest monthlyized absolute change in HCPCS entropy between consecutive observed months.
missing_value_logic: NaN if fewer than 2 valid observations.
notes: Gap-aware; divided by calendar-month distance.

definition: Mean monthlyized absolute change in HCPCS entropy.
missing_value_logic: NaN if fewer than 2 valid observations.

definition: Count of consecutive-pair steps where monthlyized entropy change > HIGH_ENTROPY_CHANGE.
missing_value_logic: 0 if column absent or fewer than 2 months.

definition: Mean monthly Herfindahl concentration index of HCPCS paid share.
missing_value_logic: NaN if column absent or all NaN.
notes: Bounded [0,1]; higher = more concentrated.

definition: Max monthly HHI.
missing_value_logic: NaN if column absent or all NaN.

definition: Fraction of non-NaN months where HHI > HIGH_CONCENTRATION_HHI.
notes: NaN months excluded from both numerator and denominator.

definition: Largest monthlyized absolute change in HHI between consecutive observed months.
missing_value_logic: NaN if fewer than 2 valid observations.
notes: Gap-aware.

definition: Mean monthlyized absolute change in HHI.
missing_value_logic: NaN if fewer than 2 valid observations.

definition: Count of steps where monthlyized HHI change > HIGH_HHI_CHANGE.
missing_value_logic: 0 if column absent or fewer than 2 months.

definition: Mean number of distinct HCPCS codes used per observed month.
Max distinct HCPCS codes in a single observed month.
missing_value_logic: NaN if column absent or all NaN.

definition: Std dev of monthly HCPCS code count.
OLS slope of hcpcs_count_t on observed-row index.
notes: Units are codes per observed step, not per calendar month (spacing is irregular).

definition: Fraction of non-NaN observed months where provider billed exactly one HCPCS code.
notes: Float comparison avoided; uses round().

definition: 1 if months_active < min_months_default; 0 otherwise.
notes: Providers with flag=1 are dropped from output by default. Use --no-filter to keep them.
